docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOURSAU, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT GOURSAU, AARON SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOURSAU, DANIEL
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT GOURSAU, AARON
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF GOURSAU, DANIEL

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JUN-08-2011 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF DANIEL GOURSAU'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
FEES NOT PAID. COMPLAINT FILED ON 5/6/11; DEFAULT ENTERED ON 5/23/11; JUDGMENT OF 5/23/11 OF DANIEL GOURSAU ARE STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOURSAU, DANIEL HEARING SET FOR JUN-08-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOURSAU, DANIEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOURSAU, AARON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 65 LEO STREET (2ND FLOOR, FIRST BEDROOM ON THE RIGHT) SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94112, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOURSAU, DANIEL SERVED MAY-06-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GOURSAU, AARON
